sentences.target: Je transporte les cartons au garage.

translations.fr: Je transporte les cartons au garage.
translations.en: I'm carrying the boxes to the garage.
translations.de: Ich trage die Kartons in die Garage.
translations.pt: Levo as caixas para a garagem.
translations.he: אני סוחב את הקופסאות אל המוסך.
translations.vi: Tôi mang các thùng đến gara.
translations.nl: Ik draag de dozen naar de garage.
translations.hi: मैं बॉक्सों को गैरेज तक ले जा रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 箱をガレージに運んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the clause and controls the verb’s agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular of ‘transporter’; denotes the action and agrees with ‘Je’.
Definite determiner, plural; introduces the direct object noun ‘cartons’ and marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of ‘transporte’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’; introduces a prepositional complement indicating destination (‘garage’).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’, indicating the goal/place.

sentences.target: On transporte la poussette jusqu'à la voiture.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁɑ̃spɔʁt la pusɛt ʒyska la vwatyʁ/

translations.fr: On transporte la poussette jusqu'à la voiture.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁɑ̃spɔʁt la pusɛt ʒyska la vwatyʁ/
translations.en: We're moving the stroller to the car.
translations.es: Llevamos el cochecito hasta el coche.
translations.de: Wir bringen den Kinderwagen zum Auto.
translations.it: Portiamo il passeggino fino alla macchina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把婴儿车推到车边。
translations.pt: Levamos o carrinho de bebê até o carro.
translations.he: אנחנו דוחפים את עגלת התינוק אל המכונית.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đẩy xe đẩy em bé đến chiếc xe.
translations.nl: We brengen de kinderwagen naar de auto.
translations.uk: Ми веземо дитячу коляску до автомобіля.
translations.hi: हम स्ट्रोलर को कार तक ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μεταφέρουμε το καρότσι μέχρι το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.id: Kami mendorong kereta dorong bayi sampai ke mobil.
translations.da: Vi triller barnevognen hen til bilen.
translations.ja: ベビーカーを車まで押していきます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun used here as a colloquial subject equivalent to ‘we’; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘transporter’; agrees with ‘On’.
Definite determiner, feminine singular; introduces the direct object noun ‘poussette’ and marks definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘transporte’.
Complex preposition indicating a limit/endpoint; introduces the complement ‘la voiture’.
Definite determiner, feminine singular; part of the noun phrase governed by ‘jusqu’à’, marking definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘jusqu’à’, indicating the endpoint.

sentences.target: Tu peux transporter ce sac pour moi.
sentences.reading: /ty pø tʁɑ̃spɔʁte sə sak puʁ mwa/

translations.fr: Tu peux transporter ce sac pour moi.
translations.ipa: /ty pø tʁɑ̃spɔʁte sə sak puʁ mwa/
translations.en: Could you carry this bag for me.
translations.es: Por favor, lleva esta bolsa para mí.
translations.de: Bitte trag diese Tasche für mich.
translations.it: Per favore, porta questa borsa per me.
translations.ru: Пожалуйста, понеси эту сумку для меня.
translations.pt: Por favor, leve esta bolsa para mim.
translations.he: בבקשה, תסחוב את התיק הזה בשבילי.
translations.tr: Lütfen bu çantayı benim için taşı.
translations.vi: Làm ơn mang giúp tôi cái túi này.
translations.ar: من فضلك، احمل هذه الحقيبة من أجلي.
translations.nl: Draag deze tas voor mij, alsjeblieft.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, понеси цю сумку для мене.
translations.hu: Kérlek, vidd el ezt a táskát helyettem.
translations.hi: कृपया यह बैग मेरे लिए उठा दीजिए.
translations.pl: Proszę, ponieś tę torbę za mnie.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, κουβάλησε αυτή την τσάντα για μένα.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, बær denne vesken for meg.
translations.id: Tolong bawakan tas ini untuk saya.
translations.sv: Snälla, bär den här väskan åt mig.
translations.ro: Te rog, cară această geantă pentru mine.
translations.cs: Prosím, přenes pro mě tuhle tašku.
translations.da: Bær venligst denne taske for mig.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja kanna tämä laukku puolestani.
translations.ja: このバッグを運んでください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Modal verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes the infinitive ‘transporter’ as its complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘peux’, expressing the action that is possible.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘sac’ (the direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘transporter’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary complement.
Stressed personal pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’ (beneficiary).

sentences.target: Ils transportent le canapé dans l'escalier.

translations.fr: Ils transportent le canapé dans l'escalier.
translations.en: They're carrying the couch up the stairs.
translations.es: Suben el sofá por las escaleras.
translations.de: Sie tragen das Sofa die Treppe hinauf.
translations.it: Portano il divano su per le scale.
translations.ru: Они несут диван по лестнице наверх.
translations.pt: Eles carregam o sofá escada acima.
translations.he: הם נושאים את הספה במעלה המדרגות.
translations.vi: Họ khiêng chiếc ghế sofa lên cầu thang.
translations.nl: Ze dragen de bank de trap op.
translations.hu: Felfelé viszik a kanapét a lépcsőn.
translations.hi: वे सोफ़ा को सीढ़ियों पर ऊपर ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Niosą kanapę po schodach w górę.
translations.el: Ανεβάζουν τον καναπέ από τις σκάλες.
translations.da: De bærer sofaen op ad trappen.
translations.ja: 階段を上ってソファを運んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, masculine plural; syntactic subject controlling 3rd person plural agreement on the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural of ‘transporter’; agrees with ‘Ils’.
Definite determiner, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun ‘canapé’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘transportent’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Noun (with elided definite article ‘l’’ attached in the surface form); object of the preposition ‘dans’, indicating location.
